title: Green Bean Bredie
excerpt: Toks van der Lidne and I go a long way back. He is an incredibly positive person. Taking him back to his mother's green bean bredie on Stoofstories with Marinda was a great honour.
html: Toks van der Lidne and I go a long way back. He is an incredibly positive person. Taking him back to his mother's green bean bredie on Stoofstories with Marinda was a great honour.

steps: You can take a shortcut here and steam the meat for about 25 to 30 minutes in the steamer.
Brown the neck in oil and take it out of the pot.
Fry the onions in oil until glassy.
Fry the cumin together with the onions.
Put the meat back into the pot with the onions.
Add the rest of the ingredients, except the potatoes, beans, salt and pepper, nutmeg and lemon zest.
Let it cook for about 60 minutes or until the meat is almost tender.
Now add the potatoes and cook for another 20 minutes.
Lastly, add the sliced beans, salt, pepper and nutmeg.
Cook now until everything is tender, but not mushy.
Grate the zest of one lemon over.
